name: Breakfast Pizza/From Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Bake It All mix, do not pack
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the sausage links into pennywise slices.
2. Make a well in the center of the mix.
3. Add milk and stir with a fork about 25 times.
4. Turn onto a sheet of waxed paper.
5. Knead well, 6 times.
6. Roll out on lightly floured pastry cloth or board to a 14-inch circle.
7. Place on a pizza pan or cookie sheet.
8. Spread preserves mixed with lemon juice in a thin layer over the dough.
9. Sprinkle sausage evenly over the top.
10. Bake in a 450°F oven for 15 to 18 minutes.
